summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of StructIQ interactive presentation app. All 7 steps, navigation functionality, visual elements, and animations working perfectly.
passed_tests: Title Card (Step 0) displays correctly with StructIQ title, subtitle, and 'Press → to begin' text
Arrow Right key navigation advances through all steps (0-6)
Arrow Left key navigation goes back through all steps
Click anywhere advances to next step functionality
Step counter shows correct format 'X / 6' on all steps
StructIQ watermark visible in bottom right on all steps
Blueprint grid background visible on all steps
Upper boundary condition: Cannot go above step 6
Lower boundary condition: Cannot go below step 0
Step 1 (Raw Input): Video icon and 96-frame grid display
Step 2 (Frame Selection): Filtering badges and green surviving frames display
Step 3 (Spatial Problem): Question mark and 'data problem' text display
Step 4 (QR Zone Detection): 3 QR zones with color-coded frames display
Step 5 (VLM Analysis): Brain/VLM element with output cards display
Step 6 (Evidence Not Trust): Dashboard mockup with closing statement display
Framer Motion animations are smooth during navigation
All visual elements verified through screenshots
